---
name: New Language Support
about: Request or track adding a new language to the pipeline
title: "[LANG] "
labels: language-support
assignees: ""
---

## Language

- **Name:** (e.g., Azerbaijani)
- **ISO code:** (e.g., az)
- **Language family:** (e.g., Turkic)

## Datasets

List HuggingFace datasets for this language:

- [ ] Instruction dataset: `<repo>`
- [ ] Raw text corpus: `<repo>`
- [ ] Evaluation dataset: `<repo>`

## Base model candidates

Which models have seen this language during pretraining?

## Evaluation plan

How will you measure quality? (e.g., MMLU translation, perplexity benchmark)
